zh.Westwood by Ramsgate, Kent, England: 英國肯特魏斯伍德 白 拉姆斯蓋特
zh.Hartford, Huntingdonshire, England: 英國亨廷格多史爾哈特福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Criol於1271年出生在英國肯特普雷斯頓時，她的父親Bertram de Criol36歲，母親Eleanor de Crevequer27歲。她於1294年與Richard Rokesley在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1323年3月18日在英國肯特盧可利享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Criol于1271年出生在英国肯特普雷斯頓时，她的父亲Bertram de Criol36岁，母亲Eleanor de Crevequer27岁。她于1294年与Richard Rokesley在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1323年3月18日在英国肯特盧可利享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alberto, Hipolito, Luis, Eriberto, Jose, Luisa, Ramon, Ricardo.  French/Haitian Edwige, Fritz, Serge, Yvrose.
Catalan: from the old personal name Oriol, from Latin Aureolus.

Catalan and French: nickname, possibly for a flamboyant dresser or sweet singer, from Catalan and Old French oriol ‘oriole’ (from Latin aureolus ‘golden’), a species of bird of which the male has bright yellow and black plumage. As a surname of French origin it is also common in Haiti.

variants.name: Oriel
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English and Old French female personal name Oriold, Oriel, from ancient Germanic Aurildis, Orieldis, composed of elements meaning ‘fire’ + ‘strife’.
French (Vosges): nickname from Old French oriel, a variant of oriol ‘oriole’ (see Oriol ).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Criol was born in 1271, in Preston, Kent, England, her father, Bertram de Criol, was 36 and her mother, Eleanor de Crevequer, was 27. She married Richard Rokesley in 1294, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 18 March 1323, in Ruxley, Kent, England, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Criol est née en 1271, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Bertram de Criol, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Crevequer, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Rokesley en 1294, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 mars 1323, à Ruxley, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Criol 1271 in Preston, Kent, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bertram de Criol 36 und ihre Mutter Eleanor de Crevequer 27. Sie hat 1294 in England, United Kingdom Richard Rokesley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. März 1323 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Ruxley, Kent, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Criol è nata il nel 1271 nel Preston, Kent, England, sua padre, Bertram de Criol, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Eleanor de Crevequer, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Richard Rokesley nel 1294, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 18 marzo 1323, nel Ruxley, Kent, England, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Criolが1271年にイギリスケントプレストンで生まれた時，父Bertram de Criolは36歳，母Eleanor de Crevequerは27歳であった。1294年にイギリスイギリスでRichard Rokesleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1323年3月18日にイギリスケントルクスリーで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Criol(이)가 1271년 영국 켄트 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bertram de Criol(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor de Crevequer(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1294년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Richard Rokesley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1323년 3월 18일 영국 켄트 루스리에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Criol nasceu em 1271, em Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bertram de Criol, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Crevequer, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Rokesley em 1294, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de março de 1323, em Ruxley, Kent, Inglaterra, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Criol родилась в 1271 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени Bertram de Criol было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Crevequer, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Rokesley в 1294 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 18 марта 1323 г. в местности руксли, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Criol nació en 1271, en Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Bertram de Criol, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Crevequer, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Richard Rokesley en 1294, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 18 de marzo de 1323, en Ruxley, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 52 años.
